nits: off-by-one: empty-table initialStateâ†’null then first record added causes silent re-baseline (zero events) on first poll; first event fires on second poll. Spec-silent, but worth documenting.

no offset pagination: >100 new records between polls would drop the oldest excess. Bounded and rare for 1-min poll cadence, but a logged warning when records.length===FETCH_PAGE_SIZE && we walked all without hitting boundary would aid observability.
payload includes bonus `record_id` field not in spec literal `{ record, base_id, table_id, view_id }`. Redundant with `record.id` but harmless.
`view_id: undefined` is set on the payload object when viewId is absent; serializes away via JSON but a strict consumer reading the object directly would see the key. Consider conditional spread.
